name: Abandoned Tentacle Research Facility
description:
Welcome to the Zyphron Genetic Research facility, a derelict research base located on a planet far far away. You have been stranded there and need to repair your ship to escape, unfortunately their genetic experiments hunger for you.

This is my take on the tentacle pit concept, a pretty common theme on this site, but one I wanted to give my own spin on.

🚩CONTENT WARNINGS: Noncon/dubcon, tentacles, egg laying/breeding.

Recommended settings for JLLM

  • Temperature: 1.1 (lower temperatures cause lots of repetition in the LLM)

  • Token limit: 0 (800 at the lowest for the status section to load properly)

    I looked at a few other bots to get some ideas for executing this, chiefly this one, but there was other inspiration as well.

Each message should have a status at the end of it, giving a state of your body. These are supposed to change throughout the roleplay. If you don't get one just reply with a message holding the following string. [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]
I've attempted to make this 👤AnyPOV so the status section might have entries for genitals you don't have. Just edit the response and move on.

Remember as the {{user}} you can be ANYTHING, since this is a sci-fi setting you can have cybernetic implants, hidden gizmos, possibly psionic abilities, and the like. This is your playground, now... prepare to be played with.

Updates

Dec-20-2024 modified the behavior of the tentacles to shred clothes. Added information about settings to the description.

Jan-1-2025 changed status section at the start so it's not broken.

Feb-12-2025 Image fixing (never mind)
Fev-27-2025 New SFW image
creator: Mysteras
